title: dianthus broteri subsp. subbaeticus
intro: Dianthus broteri subsp. subbaeticus, also known as the broteri pink, is a perennial plant species of the carnation family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dianthus broteri subsp. subbaeticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
